name: Charcoal
process_hint: Carbonise wood in the furnace. This is the fuel and carbon source for later iron outcomes.

name: Wrought Iron
process_hint: Same iron plus charcoal charge as steel and cast iron. Furnace tuning decides the outcome.
ratio_hint: Bias toward the lower-carbon side of the furnace ratio.
temperature_hint: Run hot enough to smelt, but below the tighter steel window.

name: Steel
process_hint: Same iron plus charcoal charge as wrought iron and cast iron. Furnace tuning decides the outcome.
ratio_hint: Hold the carbon mix in the narrow middle window.
temperature_hint: Reach the hotter steel window and keep the ratio controlled.

name: Cast Iron
process_hint: Same iron plus charcoal charge as wrought iron and steel. Furnace tuning decides the outcome.
ratio_hint: Push too far toward carbon and the melt tips into cast iron.
temperature_hint: High heat with excess carbon produces the brittle cast outcome.
